title: There was an Old Man of St. Bees
content:
There was an Old Man of St. Bees
    Who was stung in the arm by a wasp.
            When asked, "Does it hurt?"
            He replied, "No, it doesn't,
    But I thought all the while 'twas a hornet."
meaning:
William Schwenck Gilbert's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "There was an Old Man of St. Bees"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
